daily.today_energy: The cosmos is giving you that main character energy today, Aries. Mercury's vibes are helping you articulate things you've been holding back. Trust the momentum—it's real and it's yours to ride.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, your person needs to hear something genuine from you today. Single? Someone's been noticing you more than you realize. Either way, authenticity is your love language right now.
daily.career: Your ideas are sharper than usual, and people are actually listening. This is the day to pitch that thing you've been sitting on or have a real conversation with your boss. The timing hits different today.
daily.health: Your body's asking you to move it today—doesn't have to be intense, just get your energy flowing. A walk, some stretching, dancing in your room, whatever calls to you. Your nervous system will thank you.

weekly.overview: This week is all about momentum. You're shedding old habits and stepping into a much more empowered version of yourself. Expect rapid changes and trust that you have the stamina to handle them all.
weekly.love: Romantic boundaries become a major theme. You'll need to figure out where you end and the other person begins. Establish what you truly need and don't settle for lukewarm energy.
weekly.career: A brilliant collaborative opportunity presents itself mid-week. Partnering up with someone whose skills contrast yours will create something magical. Keep your ego in check and listen closely.
weekly.health: Focus on your sleep hygiene. The intense cosmic energy might make your mind race at night. Incorporate a wind-down routine that involves reading or meditation to ground your active fiery spirit.
